"use strict"; module.exports = function walk(nodes, cb, bubble) { var i, max, node, result; for(i = 0, max = nodes.length; i < max; i += 1){ node = nodes[i]; if (!bubble) { result = cb(node, i, nodes); } if (result !== false && node.type === "function" && Array.isArray(node.nodes)) { walk(node.nodes, cb, bubble); } if (bubble) { cb(node, i, nodes); } } };
